scripts.test: pnpm --filter @2dayz/shared test && pnpm --filter @2dayz/server test && pnpm --filter @2dayz/client test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @2dayz/shared build && pnpm --filter @2dayz/server build && pnpm --filter @2dayz/client build
scripts.verify:health: pnpm exec playwright test apps/client/e2e/join-and-spawn.spec.ts --grep "health endpoint returns 200"
scripts.verify:room-cap: pnpm exec playwright test apps/client/e2e/reconnect-and-retry.spec.ts --grep "thirteenth synthetic join"
scripts.verify:join-time: pnpm exec playwright test apps/client/e2e/join-and-spawn.spec.ts --grep "landing-to-spawn stays under 10 seconds"
scripts.verify:reconnect-time: pnpm exec playwright test apps/client/e2e/reconnect-and-retry.spec.ts --grep "reconnect completes in under 5 seconds"
scripts.verify:tick-rate: pnpm exec playwright test apps/client/e2e/join-and-spawn.spec.ts --grep "reported tick rate stays within the 20-30 Hz target range"
